name: TransDigm Group Incorporated
description: TransDigm Group Incorporated is a leading global designer, producer, and supplier of highly engineered aircraft components for use on nearly all commercial and military aircraft in service today. The company's product offerings include mechanical/electro-mechanical actuators and controls, ignition systems and engine technology, specialized pumps and valves, power conditioning devices, and specialized aerospace connectors. TransDigm focuses on proprietary products with significant aftermarket content, serving a diverse customer base across the aerospace and defense industries. Headquartered in Cleveland, Ohio, the company operates through numerous subsidiaries, maintaining a decentralized structure that emphasizes operational efficiency and value creation.
